title: 计算机组成原理 - 学习总结
content: COMP2120 Computer Organization Chapter 8. External Storage Disk Layout 在一个 Platter 上： 一个 Track 是由多个 Track Sector 沿圆周围起来的圆 一个 Sector 是由多个 Track Sector 沿直径形成的 Inter-sector gap （沿直径方向）分割多个 Sector Inter-track gap （沿圆周方向）分割多个 Track 会有多个 Platter 叠在一起，俯视视角下，多个位置重叠的 Sector 称为 Cylinder。 Track-Sector 的组成 Gap：如上 Sync： Ad： Data： ECC (Error Correction Code)： Chapter 9. I/O Modules I/O Modules Modules Functions 一个 IO 模块需要以下主要的模块： EN CN 说明 Control and Timing 控制 可能同时与多个外部/内部设备互动，控制不冲突 Processor Communication 处理器通信 解析指令；通过 system bus 交换数据；Status Reporting；Address Recognition Device Communication 设备通信 同上 Data Buffering 数据缓冲 Transfer rate into/out of main memory is high，但是传输很慢 →\to→ buffer 一下，一次传输多个数据 Error Detection 错误检查 Module Structure IO 模块通过 signal lines (e.g. system bus lines) 与计算机的其他部分连接。 传输到其他地方的 Data 和从其他地方接受的 Data 都 buffer 在 registers 中，也有一些 status register 提供状态信息。 模块通过 control lines 与 processor 通信，processor 可以通过 control lines 向 IO 模块发送指令。 Concepts of I/O Memory-Mapped I/O 与 I/O-Ports 一些概念： Register Usage Status Register 反应设备的状态（正在读写，准备就绪与否，纸张已打印……） Control Register 控制设备的操作（读/写，打印机纸张大小……） Data Register 要读写的 data / CPU 通过读写 I/O 模块的 registers 来控制 I/O 模块的操作。 Port-Mapped I/O Registers 可以成为专用的 (dedicated) I/O port（如果 CPU 提供 direct I/O 操作的指令） Memory-Mapped I/O Registers 放在 Memory Map 中，I/O Operation 需要以读写 memory address 的方式进行。 I/O Techniques Overview Programmed I/O Data 在 Processor 和 I/O Module 之间传输。Processor 拥有对 I/O Module 的直接控制。传输指令时，Processor 必须等 I/O Module 完成指令才能继续操作。（Drawback: 浪费处理器资源） Interrupt-Driven I/O Processor 向 I/O Module 发送完指令后继续其他指令，当 I/O Module 完成时，Processor 的当前指令被中断（interrupt） Direct Memory Access (DMA) Processor 负责从 Main memory 提取 data 和把 data 存放到 main memory 中，I/O Module 直接从 main memory 里读取/写入数据，无需通过 Processor 中继。 Programmed I/O Control and Status Register (CSR) is used to control the operation of the device and report status. Interrupt-Driven I/O When I/O finishes, I/O module interrupts the CPU. The CPU will then suspend current program, execute the remaining I/O operations(as in Programmed I/O), then return to the suspended program. 硬件流程和软件流程： Direct Memory Access (DMA) DMA 引入新的 module，模拟 processor 和 从 processor 手里接过 system bus 的控制权，用来通过 system bus 向/从 memory 中传输数据。因此，DMA 必须在 processor 不工作时占用 system bus，或者干脆命令 processor 把当前进程 suspend，称为 cycle stealing。 当 processor 需要读写数据时，它向 DMA 发送一个命令，包含如下信息： 信息 说明 R/W Control Line 要读写时，通过 DMA 和处理器之间的 control line 来发送请求 Address of I/O device involved 通过 data line 传输 Start location of memory 内存地址的开头。通过 data line 传输，寄存在 DMA 的 Address Register 里 Number of Words 读写多少数据。data line 传输，保存在 Data Count Register 里 然后 processor 继续其他工作（它把 I/O operation 授权给 DMA），DMA 直接操作 memory（不经过 processor）。传输结束时，DMA 向 processor 发送 interrupt 信号。 【何时 processor 会 suspend】只在需要用到 system bus 的时候，pauses for one bus cycle，然后 DMA 传输 one word 并返回控制权。 DMA 的不同设计 DMA 和 I/O 模块可以合并起来：DMA 既可以作为 I/O module 的一部分，也可以是 DMA 作为独立的部分控制多个 I/O modules。更进一步地，DMA 可以通过 I/O bus 控制多个 I/O modules。在以上三种方案里，都只有 DMA 通过 system bus 和 memory 通信。 Chapter 10. Instruction Set and Addressing Elements of Machine Instructions 标识 作用 Operation Code Operation to be performed. (e.g. ADD, SUB, XOR) 操作符 Source Operand Reference Inputs for the Operation. Result Operand Reference 储存结果的寄存器 Next Instruction Reference 下一个指令的地址 Operand 可以是以下四种 Main/Virtual Memory Processor Register Immediate I/O device Types of Data Operands 3 operands OP A,B,C A←B op CA\leftarrow B\ op\ CA←B op C 2 operands OP A,B A←A op BA\leftarrow A\ op\ BA←A op B 1 operand OP A AC←AC op AAC\leftarrow AC\ op\ AAC←AC op A, ACACAC stands for accumulator which is a special built-in register. 0 operands OP T←(T−1) op TT\leftarrow (T-1)\ op\ TT←(T−1) op T pops two operands from stack and add them together, then push them back. Registers Operands 可以在 Memory 里或者 Registers 里。 两种类型的 register General Purpose Registers Can be used freely Dedicated Purpose Registers PCPCPC (Program Counter), SPSPSP (stack pointer) Flags Flag Registers (PSW: Processor Status Word) Addressing Mode Overview of Addressing Techniques Immediate Direct Indirect Register Register indirect Displacement Stack Notations Symbol Meaning AAA 指令中的地址字段（address field）中的内容（不一定使地址指向的值） RRR 指令中的地址字段（指向 register 的地址）中的内容 EAEAEA 被使用的 operand 实际所在的地址，Operand=(EA)Operand=(EA)Operand=(EA) (X)(X)(X) 地址 XXX 的内容、或者 register XXX 的内容 Immediate Addressing A:Operand/ValueA:\text{Operand/Value} A:Operand/Value Address Field 里的值就是数字的字面值，通常以 two’s complement 方式直接储存在 instruction 里。当字面值寄存到 register 里时，会 extend sign bit 到 full word size。 Direct Addressing A:EA(EA)=Operand/ValueA:EA\\(EA)=\text{Operand/Value} A:EA(EA)=Operand/Value Address Field 里保存操作数的有效地址 Effective Address。 Indirect Addressing A:address(A)=EA(EA)=Operand/ValueA:address\\ (A)=EA\\ (EA)=\text{Operand/Value} A:address(A)=EA(EA)=Operand/Value 操作数的有效地址 EAEAEA 也放在 memory 里，地址是 EA′EA'EA′ （也就是说 EA′EA'EA′ 这个地址上的值是 EAEAEA，需要再访问一次地址才是真实的数）。Address Field 里就放 EA′EA'EA′。 Register Addressing 类似于 Direct Addressing，但 Addressing Field 里是指向 Register 的。 A:EA=R(R)=Operand/ValueA:EA=R\\(R)=\text{Operand/Value} A:EA=R(R)=Operand/Value Register Indirect Addressing 类似于 Indirect Addressing，但 Register 里储存的是操作数的有效地址。 A:R(R)=EA(EA)=Operand/ValueA:R\\(R)=EA\\(EA)=\text{Operand/Value} A:R(R)=EA(EA)=Operand/Value Displacement Addressing Two address fields，至少一个 explicit，A2A_2A2​ 可以 implicit。Register + offset A1:address, A2:REA=A1+(R)A_1:address,\ A_2: R\\ EA=A_1+(R) A1​:address, A2​:REA=A1​+(R) Stack Addressing EA=top of stack registerEA=top\ of\ stack\ register EA=top of stack register Chapter 11. Assembly Language Programming Each line has four fields: [label], mnemonic, operand list, comment Mnemonic Field: Instruction, Assembler Directive Assembler directives are directions to the assembler to take some action or change a setting. Assembler directives do not represent instructions, and are not translated into machine code. Directives Description .data Tells the assembler to add all subsequent data to the data section .text Tells the assembler to add subsequent code to the text section (i.e. program section) .global [name] Makes [name] external to other files, for multiple files in the program. .space [expression] Reserves spaces, amount specified by the value of expression in bytes. The assembler fills the space with zeros. .word value1 [,value2, ...] Put the values in successive memory locations. Example ALP (Control Structures): 1234567891011121314151617181920# if(a[0] > a[1]) x = a[0];# else x = a[1];.dataa: .word 1	.word 3x:	.word 4.textmain:	LD #a, r8 # r8 is now address of A (#a)	LD 0(r8), r9	# r9 = a[0] = 1, Displacement Addressing	LD 4(r8), r10	# r10 = a[1] = 3, Displacement Addressing	BGT r9, r10, f1 # Branch if r9>r10, goto f1	ST r10, x # x = r10	BR f2 # Branch to f2 without conditionf1: ST r9, x # x = r9f2:	ret # Return to OS Example ALP (Repetition Structure): 123456789101112131415161718# a = 0;# for (i = 0; i < 10; i++) a += i;.dataa: .word 0.textmain:	sub r8,r8,r8 # r8 = 0, 或者 xor r8,r8,r8	ld #0xa,r9 # r9 = Oxa = 10, number of iterations	sub r10,r10,r10 # r10 = 0, loop counter 计数器	ld #1,r11 # r11 = 1，自增器f1:	add r8,r10,r8 # r8 += r10 先加到 r8，从 0 开始，10 结束。	add r10,r11,r10 # r10++, increment counter	bgt r9,r10,f1 # if (r9 > r10) goto f1	st r8,a # a = r8	ret # return 【WARNING!!】如果 function call 需要修改 register 的值，就需要先 push 到 stack 里，结束后再 pop 修改回来。 Chapter 12. Operating System Support The OS is a software that controls the execution of programs on a processor and manages the processor’s resources. (Application Programs) The end user views a computer system in terms of an application , not concerned about the computer’s architecture. (AP & Utilities) Application can be expressed in a programming language , then as a set of processor instructions. To ease this task, a set of system programs is provided. Some of these programs are referred to as utilities. (Utilities) These implement frequently used functions that assist in program creation, the management of files, and the control of I/O devices. (OS) The OS masks the details of the hardware from the programmer and provides the programmer with a convenient interface for using the system. It acts as mediator, making it easier for the programmer and for application programs to access and use those facilities and services. OS Services Program creation The OS provides a variety of facilities and services, such as editors and debuggers, to assist the programmer in creating programs. Typically, these services are in the form of utility programs that are not actually part of the OS but are accessible through the OS. Program execution A number of steps need to be performed to execute a program. Instructions and data must be loaded into main memory, I/O devices and files must be initialized, and other resources must be prepared. The OS handles all of this for the user. Access to I/O devices Each I/O device requires its own specific set of instructions or control signals for operation. The OS provides a uniform I/O interface to the programs, and takes care of the details so that the programmer can think in terms of simple reads and writes. Also handle sharing of the devices among users to prevent users from holding the device indefinitely Controlled access to files How files and directory are created, modified, hidden from the user. Also file protections, file sharing is managed by the OS. System access In the case of a shared or public system, the OS controls access to the system as a whole and to specific system resources. The access function must provide protection of resources and data from unauthorized users and must resolve conflicts for resource contention. Error detection and response Report error to programs, and their remedial action Accounting Collect usage statistics for various resources and monitor performance parameters such as response time, page fault rate Protection Scheme CPU executes in different modes to facilitate protection. User Mode Supervisor Mode (Kernel Mode) Some resources (such as I/O devices) or actions (some special instructions) can only be run in kernel mode, so that users will not have access to them. OS is supposed to be well-tested, while bugs exist in user programs. If user programs are allowed to handle system resources, they may hang the system, or hold the resources indefinitely, if their program is buggy. Only the OS (which execute in kernel mode), will have the rights . OS Call Mechanism System has to change from user mode to kernel mode to run/use the protected resources. Users cannot change themselves to kernel mode . The OS functions are usually accessed via special entry points called system calls. The OS will change to kernel mode, and execute with higher privileges than user program. Multitasking and Time-sharing System CPU idles (闲置) when I/O is performed. To fully utilize CPU resource, CPU is shared among processes (multiple tasks). 在 tasks 之间快速切换 Each process is allocated a time slice of 0.1 sec, say. When process uses up its time slice, it will stop execution, and let the next process to be executed When a process cannot proceed (e. g., perform I/O), it will also stop execution Process Scheduling The system maintain a queue of processes. The order of the processes in the queue is controlled by many factors. Process priority How long it has been waiting Whether it has used up its time slices System loading The first process in the process queue is picked for execution. Memory Management Virtual Memory Physical Address VS. Logical Address Terms Explanation Physical Address low-level, hardware-specific and used by the hardware directly Logical Address higher-level, software-friendly address that requires mapping or translation into a physical address before being used by the hardware Virtual memory uses both hardware and software to enable a computer to compensate for physical memory shortages, temporarily transferring data from random access memory (RAM = physical memory) to disk storage. Mapping chunks of memory to disk files enables a computer to treat secondary memory as though it were main memory. Memory Management Unit (MMU) Similar to Cache memory, it is based on the principle of locality, and we use address mapping to map logical addresses (of programs) to physical addresses (of memory). Paging Memory is partitioned into equal fixed-size chunks that are relatively small. Processes are also divided into small fixed-size chunks of same size. The chunks of a program (called pages) could be assigned to available chunks of memory (called frames). Memory 不足的解决办法：Logical Address + Page Table 如果 memory 空间不足了，可以利用 logical address。对于每个 process，OS 维护一个 page table，保存 frame location for each page。在程序本身内部，每一个 logical address 包含 page number 和 page 内的相对地址 (relative address within the page). With paging, the logical-to-physical address translation is still done by processor hardware. Presented with a logical address (page number, relative address), the processor uses the page table to produce a physical address (frame number, relative address). 例子： Page Table Structure Each page table entry (PTE) contains: Page Number V P D Physical Frame Number Page 0 Page 1 Terms Explanation V Valid bit. Whether this page is in memory. P Protection Information. (more than 1 bit). indicate protection mode (read/write, kernel/user mode) D Dirty bit. Whether this page has changed (to prevent unnecessarily write back when the page has not been changed, since writing back is expensive.) Demand Paging (Similar to Cache) When program starts, nothing is in memory. We only bring in pages on demand (when the page is needed). Advantage fast response, because we do not need to bring in the entire program for it to start. Disadvantage a lot of page faults (similar to cache miss), until a stable working set of the program has been brought into the memory. Use pre-paging to bring in a number of pages at the beginning to minimize this. Cache and Virtual Memory Analogues Cache Virtual Memory Block Page Block Size Page Size Block Offset Page Offset Cache Miss Page Fault Tag Virtual Page Number Address Translation When the program access a memory location via the CPU address bus: extract the logical page number (the most significant n-bits) find the corresponding Page Table Entry and see if the page is in physical memory If YES, then get the physical frame number and append the offset within the page to it. If NO, then generate a page fault. Address Mapping If the page is not in main memory, then a page fault is generated. The OS will take over, fetch the required page from hard disk, put it in the memory (possibly with a replacement) and restart the program. Since hard disk I/O is very slow, the process involved will usually be suspended and the CPU will switch to another process. Page Fault Handling Find the page from hard disk Find a free page in the physical memory (or find one to replace) If the replaced page is dirty (i.e. has been changed), write back to hard disk. Make PTE of replaced page invalid. Write required page to that physical page. Modify the PTE of required page to contain correct info. Page Replacement First In First Out (FIFO) Least Recently Used (LRU) Write Strategy Write back strategy is always used. Write through to hard disk is too expensive. Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB) Virtual Memory 也会导致两次读取 Physical Memory：一次 fetch PTE，一次 fetch data。为了减少读取次数，把 valid PTE cache 在 TLB 里。那么在 Address Translation 的时候，先在 TLB 里查 PTE；找不到的话，再去 Page Table 查找（此时已经发生 Page Fault），所以接着写入 Memory，最后把对应的 PTE 放进 TLB 并更新。 Combining Cache and Virtual Memory 对于程序而言，我们先用 logical address 在 TLB/Page Table 里查找出 physical address（virtual memory，本章），然后再用 physical address 在 cache memory 里查找数据（cache，第 7 章）。 流程图： Chapter 13. Processor Organization and RISC Processor Organization The processor execute instructions via two operations: Moving data from one place to another Perform data transformation/processing through ALU The data are stored in registers inside the CPU These operations are controlled by control signals generated by the control units Data movement can be described as follows Dest←SrcDest \leftarrow SrcDest←Src (E.g.) Instruction Fetch MAR <- PC # Get content of instruction IR <- mem[MAR] # Pass instructioon to IR to decode PC <- PC+4 # Increase PC by 4 to get next word/instruction 1234567<img src='../_imgs/comp2120/fig13-1.png' style='zoom:0.5'>#### Control Signals- Data movement is **controlled by control signals** MAR <- PC 12345678910111213141516171819201. A control signal to tell the **PC to put its content** onto the CPU bus 2. A control signal to tell the **MAR to get the value** from the CPU bus #### Instruction Execution Cycle3 stages:1. Fetch Instruction (FI)2. Decode Instruction (DI)3. Instruction Execution: 1. Calculate Operand Address (CO) 2. Fetch Operand from Registers/Memory (FO) 3. Execute Instruction (EI) 4. Write Operand (WO)- For modern processors, only `LOAD` and `STORE` instructions are related to memory operandsExample: `ADD A, B, C` (`A,B,C` are direct addressing, 4-word instruction) Fetch Instruction: MAR <- PC IR <- mem[MAR] # Decode instruction PC <- PC+4 # Point to next word CO1: MAR <- PC PC <- PC+4 MBR <- mem[MAR] MAR <- MBR FO1: MBR <- mem[MAR] ALU.input1 <- MBR CO2: MAR <- PC PC <- PC+4 MBR <- mem[MAR] MAR <- MBR FO2: MBR <- mem[MAR] ALU.input2 <- MBR EI: ALU.output <- ALU.input1+ALU.input2 CO3: MAR <- PC PC <- PC+4 MBR <- mem[MAR] MAR <- MBR WO: MBR <- ALU.output mem[MAR] <- MBR Instruction Pipeline 如何提升 throughput (吞吐量)（提升效率）？划分为六个阶段，pipeline。 多个 instruction 同时执行不同阶段 Note that not all instruction require all stages The resources (hardware) required by each stages should not overlap with each other, otherwise duplicate resources are needed 多个 internal bus，而不是一个（为了同时传输数据） dedicated incrementor for PC instead of using ALU（PC 的专用自增器，ALU 可能用来做其他计算工作） Separate read port for data and instruction (FI vs FO) May have separate instruction cache and data cache (split cache) Pipeline Hazard Situations that prevent the next instruction from entering the pipeline (for execution)（另一种解释：when the next instruction cannot execute on the following clock cycle.） Resource Hazard/Structural Hazard Resource Conflict. If only one multiplier unit available, and current and next instruction both require multiply, the next instruction must wait for previous multiply to finish. 同时读取 instruction 和 data Solutions: Add more resources (dedicated incrementor for PC) separate data/instruction cache (split cache), so that FI and FO stage will use different hardware. Data Hazard instruction waiting for the result of previous instructions. (data dependency) Rearrange instruction You may need to insert two or more instruction in between, depending on how the pipeline is arranged and optimized. forwarding the result of ADD from the output of the ALU to the input of ALU when SUB is executed. (This is called data forwarding) Types of Data Hazard Read after Write (RAW) Hazard I1I_1I1​ writes to a register and I2I_2I2​ reads the same register. Hazard occurs if the read is before the write Write after Read (WAR) Hazard I1I_1I1​ reads a register and I2I_2I2​ writes the same register. Hazard occurs if the write is before the read. Write after Write (WAW) Hazard I1I_1I1​ and I2I_2I2​ both writes to the same register, and I2I_2I2​ writes before I1I_1I1​. Only RAW hazard occurs in a pipeline. (Each stage of the later instruction will only be dispatched after the same stage of the previous instruction finishes.) The others (WAR and WAW) occurs in parallel systems. Control Hazard/Branch Hazard arises from branches or other instructions that changes the PC (e.g. CALL/JSR, jump subroutine). We don’t know where to continue until the branch instruction finishes. Branch Prediction：提前（预测并）获取 branch 内的指令，当条件被执行时可以立刻执行指令（不用再 fetch） ​	For simple branch prediction, we will change our next prediction when there is a wrong prediction. （Drawback：循环的最后一层 Dynamic Branch Prediction：连续错误预测两次才改变 prediction。 Processor Performance T=IC×CPI×CCTT=IC\times CPI\times CCT T=IC×CPI×CCT 其中：T=T=T= Execution Time，IC=IC=IC= Instruction Count，CPI=CPI=CPI= Clock per Instruction，CCT=CCT=CCT= Clock Cycle Time. ClockRate=1/clock cycle timeClock Rate=1/clock\ cycle\ timeClockRate=1/clock cycle time 总时间=多少指令×每个指令多少clock×每个clock需要多少时间指令总时间=多少指令\times 每个指令多少clock \times 每个clock需要多少时间指令总时间=多少指令×每个指令多少clock×每个clock需要多少时间指令 如何提升性能？ Exploit more effective instruction pipelining. This will lead to a smaller value of CPI. (The throughput of instruction execution is higher with pipelining). use multiple instruction execution unit. large register file — reduce memory access, hence increasing speed simplified instruction set — reduces or eliminates the need for microprograms, which is slower than hardwired implementation Characteristics of Modern Processor - RISC All instructions are register-register type except LOAD and STORE (which access memory) Fixed length and simple, fixed format instructions (格式中多余的部分可以直接丢弃) Relatively few operations and addressing modes — Simple CPU, simpler CPU implementation, faster clock rate. Also, the pipeline can be designed more efficiently, if the are less cases to consider. Use of hardwired rather than microprogrammed control (多用硬件控制) Use of instruction pipelining and extensive software and hardware techniques to eliminate the effect of pipeline hazards (减少 hazards)

title: Stanford CS229: Machine Learning
content: Stanford CS229 Lecture 2. Linear Regression, Batch/Stochastic Gradient Descent 用概率论解释为什么 cost function 是平方？ 我们假设的预测函数 y(i)=θTx(i)+ϵ(i)y^{(i)}=\theta^Tx^{(i)}+\epsilon^{(i)}y(i)=θTx(i)+ϵ(i)，其中 ϵ(i)\epsilon^{(i)}ϵ(i) 是没有算入模型的误差项。我们可以假设 ϵ(i)\epsilon^{(i)}ϵ(i) 服从正态分布 ϵ(i)∼N(0,σ2)\epsilon^{(i)}\sim\mathcal N(0,\sigma^2)ϵ(i)∼N(0,σ2)，并且是互相独立地同等分布（Independently and Identically Distributed, IID），因此其概率分布为 p(ϵ(i))=12πσexp⁡(−(ϵ(i))22σ2)p(\epsilon^{(i)})=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}\sigma}\exp(-\frac{(\epsilon^{(i)})^2}{2\sigma^2}) p(ϵ(i))=2π​σ1​exp(−2σ2(ϵ(i))2​) 这意味着 p(y(i)∣x(i);θ)=12πσexp⁡(−(y(i)−θTx(i))22σ2)p(y^{(i)}|x^{(i)};\theta)=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}\sigma}\exp(-\frac{(y^{(i)}-\theta^Tx^{(i)})^2}{2\sigma^2}) p(y(i)∣x(i);θ)=2π​σ1​exp(−2σ2(y(i)−θTx(i))2​) 这个公式的意思是，当我的样本 x(i)x^{(i)}x(i) 确定时，由于误差 ϵ(i)\epsilon^{(i)}ϵ(i) 是不确定的，所以 y(i)y^{(i)}y(i) 也是不确定的，并且他们之间只差一个常数 θTx(i)\theta^Tx^{(i)}θTx(i)，因此也可以说 (y(i)∣x(i);θ)∼N(θTx(i),σ2)(y^{(i)}|x^{(i)};\theta)\sim\mathcal N(\theta^Tx^{(i)},\sigma^2)(y(i)∣x(i);θ)∼N(θTx(i),σ2)。 给定样本矩阵 XXX 和参数 θ\thetaθ，y(i)y^{(i)}y(i) 的分布可以看作关于 y⃗\vec yy​ 的函数 p(y⃗∣X;θ)p(\vec y|X;\theta)p(y​∣X;θ)。但我们更像把它看成关于 θ\thetaθ 的函数，所以我们定义 Likelihood function \begin{aligned} L(\theta)=L(\theta|X,\vec y)&=p(\vec y|X;\theta)\\ &=\underbrace{\prod_{i=1}^n p(y^{(i)}|x^{(i)};\theta)}_ {\small\text{Expand \(X,Y\)}}\\\ &=\prod_{i=1}^n \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}\sigma}\exp(-\frac{(y^{(i)}-\theta^Tx^{(i)})^2}{2\sigma^2}) \end{aligned} 那么我们如何选取最好的 θ\thetaθ 呢？Maximum Likelihood Principal 告诉我们，我们应该选择 θ\thetaθ 使得 L(θ)L(\theta)L(θ) 最大。 为了简化计算，我们定义 Log Likelihood Function l(θ){l}(\theta)l(θ) l(θ)=ln⁡L(θ)⏟Definition=ln⁡∏i=1n12πσexp⁡(−(y(i)−θTx(i))22σ2)=nln⁡12πσ−1σ2⋅12∑i=1n(y(i)−θTx(i))2\begin{aligned} l(\theta)&=\underbrace{\ln L(\theta)}_{\small\text{Definition}}\\ &=\ln \prod_{i=1}^n \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}\sigma}\exp(-\frac{(y^{(i)}-\theta^Tx^{(i)})^2}{2\sigma^2})\\ &=n\ln{\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}\sigma}}-\frac{1}{\sigma^2}\cdot\frac12\sum_{i=1}^n(y^{(i)}-\theta^Tx^{(i)})^2 \end{aligned} l(θ)​=DefinitionlnL(θ)​​=lni=1∏n​2π​σ1​exp(−2σ2(y(i)−θTx(i))2​)=nln2π​σ1​−σ21​⋅21​i=1∑n​(y(i)−θTx(i))2​ 而后面这一部分就是我们的 cost function J(θ)J(\theta)J(θ)。 Lecture 3. Locally Weighted & Logistic Regression, Feature Selection Algorithm 当数据无法用直线拟合的时候，我们可以使用 Locally Weighted Regression。 Categories of Learning Algorithms Parametric Learning Algorithm：参数是固定的（数量……） Non-Parametric Learning Algorithm：参数数量会变（通常随数据集增大而增多） Locally Weighted Regression 对于要预测的 xxx，我们找到样本中离 xxx 最近的若干个 sample，然后利用这些 sample 在局部进行 Linear Regression，用局部拟合出来的直线进行预测。 用数学语言描述，我们仍然是求参数 θ\thetaθ 使得修改过的 cost function J(θ)J(\theta)J(θ) 最小 J(θ)=∑i=1MW(i)(θTX(i)−Y(i))2J(\theta)=\sum_{i=1}^M W^{(i)}\Big(\theta^TX^{(i)}-Y^{(i)}\Big)^2 J(θ)=i=1∑M​W(i)(θTX(i)−Y(i))2 其中的 W(i)W^{(i)}W(i) （也是矩阵）被称为 weight function，通常我们取 W(i)=exp⁡(−(X(i)−X)2τ2)W^{(i)}=\exp\Big(-\frac{(X^{(i)}-X)^2}{\tau^2}\Big) W(i)=exp(−τ2(X(i)−X)2​) 超参数 τ\tauτ （tau）决定了“局部”的大小。 Logistic Regression Logistic Regression 适合分类任务。这里我们先只讨论二分类 Binary Classification，即 h:Rn↦{0,1}h:\R^n\mapsto \{0,1\}h:Rn↦{0,1}，当 y(i)=1y^{(i)}=1y(i)=1 时称为 positive class，为 000 时称为 negative class。 如果我们沿用 Linear Regression 的方法来预测 Logistic Regression，很容易构造数据集使得这种方法给出错误的预测结果。所以，我们需要换一个 hypothesis hθ(x)h_\theta(x)hθ​(x) hθ(x)=g(θTx)=11+e−θTxh_\theta(x)=g(\theta^Tx)=\frac{1}{1+e^{-\theta^Tx}} hθ​(x)=g(θTx)=1+e−θTx1​ 其中 g(z)=11+exp⁡(z)g(z)=\frac{1}{1+\exp(z)}g(z)=1+exp(z)1​ 被称为 Logistic Function 或者 Sigmoid Function，而且有 g′(z)=g(z)(1−g(z))g'(z)=g(z)(1-g(z))g′(z)=g(z)(1−g(z)) 我们先作出一系列假设，然后按上一节的概率论方法 Maximum Likelihood 来求 θ\thetaθ。 我们定义 \begin{align*} p(y=1|x;\theta)&=h_\theta(x)\\ p(y=0|x;\theta)&=1-h_\theta(x) \end{align*} 可以统一起来 p(y∣x;θ)=(hθ(x))y(1−hθ(x))1−yp(y|x;\theta)=(h_\theta(x))^y(1-h_\theta(x))^{1-y} p(y∣x;θ)=(hθ​(x))y(1−hθ​(x))1−y 由定义，Likelihood Function 为 \begin{align*} L(\theta)&=\prod_{i=1}^n \big(h_\theta(x^{(i)})\big)^{y^{(i)}}\big(1-h_\theta(x^{(i)})\big)^{1-y^{(i)}} \end{align*} Log Likelihood Function 为 \begin{align*} l(\theta)&=\sum_{i=1}^n \Big(y^{(i)}\ln h(x^{(i)})+(1-y^{(i)})\ln\big(1-h(x^{(i)})\big)\Big) \end{align*} 我们这里也可以用 Gradient Ascent 类似的思路，我们用 θt+1←θt+α⋅∇θl(θ)\theta_{t+1}\gets \theta_t+\alpha\cdot abla_\theta l(\theta)θt+1​←θt​+α⋅∇θ​l(θ) 来迭代，而 ∇θjl(θ)=∇θj(yln⁡h(x)+(1−y)ln⁡(1−h(x)))=∇θj(yln⁡g(θTx)+(1−y)ln⁡(1−g(θTx)))⏟hθ(x)=g(θTx)=(yg(θTx)+1−y1−g(θTx))g(θTx)(1−g(θTx))xj⏟g′(z)=g(z)(1−g(z))=(y−hθ(x))xj\begin{aligned} abla_{\theta_j}l(\theta)&= abla_{\theta_j}(y\ln h(x)+(1-y)\ln(1-h(x)))\\ &=\underbrace{ abla_{\theta_j}(y\ln g(\theta^Tx)+(1-y)\ln(1-g(\theta^Tx)))}_ {\scriptsize\text{\(h_\theta(x)=g(\theta^Tx)\)}}\\ &=\underbrace{(\frac{y}{g(\theta^Tx)}+\frac{1-y}{1-g(\theta^Tx)})g(\theta^Tx)(1-g(\theta^Tx))x_j }_ {\scriptsize\text{\(g'(z)=g(z)(1-g(z))\)}}\\ &=(y-h_\theta(x))x_j \end{aligned} ∇θj​​l(θ)​=∇θj​​(ylnh(x)+(1−y)ln(1−h(x)))=hθ​(x)=g(θTx)∇θj​​(ylng(θTx)+(1−y)ln(1−g(θTx)))​​=g′(z)=g(z)(1−g(z))(g(θTx)y​+1−g(θTx)1−y​)g(θTx)(1−g(θTx))xj​​​=(y−hθ​(x))xj​​ θt+1:=θt+α⋅(y(i)−hθ(x(i)))xj(i)\theta_{t+1}:= \theta_t+\alpha\cdot(y^{(i)}-h_\theta(x^{(i)}))x_j^{(i)} θt+1​:=θt​+α⋅(y(i)−hθ​(x(i)))xj(i)​ 也被称作 Perceptron Learning Algorithm Newton’s Method 牛顿迭代法 牛顿迭代法 a←a−f(x)f′(x)a\gets a-\frac {f(x)}{f'(x)}a←a−f′(x)f(x)​ 可以快速找到零点，所以令 f(θ)=l′(θ)f(\theta)=l'(\theta)f(θ)=l′(θ)，我们可以利用来快速迭代 θ:=θ−l′(θ)l′′(θ)\theta:=\theta-\frac{l'(\theta)}{l''(\theta)} θ:=θ−l′′(θ)l′(θ)​ 找到零点，从而计算最大值。但是 θ\thetaθ 是矩阵形式，我们需要推广一下 θ:=θ−H−1∇θl(θ)\theta:=\theta-H^{-1} abla_\theta l(\theta) θ:=θ−H−1∇θ​l(θ) 其中 HHH 是 Hessian，且 Hij=∂2l(θ)∂θi∂θjH_{ij}=\frac{\partial^2l(\theta)}{\partial\theta_i\partial\theta_j}Hij​=∂θi​∂θj​∂2l(θ)​。 Lecture 4. Perceptron & Generalized Linear Model Exponential Family 如果 p.d.f. 可以寫成如下形式，那麽就稱爲 exponential family p(y;η)=b(y)exp⁡(ηTT(y)−a(η))p(y;\eta)=b(y)\exp\big(\eta^TT(y)-a(\eta)\big) p(y;η)=b(y)exp(ηTT(y)−a(η)) 其中 yyy 是 data，η\etaη 是 Natural Parameter of the Distribution，T(y)T(y)T(y) 是 Sufficient Sstatistic，a(η)a(\eta)a(η) 是 Log Partition Function，b(y)b(y)b(y) 是 Base Measure Bernoulli 分布是 Exponential Family 伯努利分布的 p.m.f. 是 p(y=1;ϕ)=ϕ,p(y=0;ϕ)=(1−ϕ)p(y=1;\phi)=\phi,p(y=0;\phi)=(1-\phi)p(y=1;ϕ)=ϕ,p(y=0;ϕ)=(1−ϕ) \begin{align*} p(y;\phi)&=\phi^y(1-\phi)^{1-y}\\ &=\exp\Big(y\ln\phi+(1-y)\ln(1-\phi)\Big)\\ &=\exp\bigg(y\ln\Big(\frac{\phi}{1-\phi}\Big)+\ln(1-\phi)\bigg) \end{align*} 可以看到 T(y)=y,b(y)=1,η=ln⁡(ϕ1−ϕ),a(η)=ln⁡(1+eη)T(y)=y,b(y)=1,\eta=\ln(\frac{\phi}{1-\phi}),a(\eta)=\ln(1+e^\eta)T(y)=y,b(y)=1,η=ln(1−ϕϕ​),a(η)=ln(1+eη) 正态分布是 Exponential Family 略。 性质 MLE w.r.t. η\etaη is concave Negative Log Likelihood is convex E[y;η]=∇ηa(η)E[y;\eta]= abla_\eta a(\eta)E[y;η]=∇η​a(η) Var(y;η)=∇η2a(η)Var(y;\eta)= abla^2_\eta a(\eta)Var(y;η)=∇η2​a(η) Generalized Linear Models Assumptions y∣x;θ∼y|x;\theta\simy∣x;θ∼ exponential family (η)(\eta)(η)

title: 卡尔曼滤波器 Kalman Filter
content: 卡尔曼滤波器 Kalman Filter 引入 我们先从一个简单的例子入手。我们要测量一枚硬币的直径，一个很简单的想法就是，我测量多次，然后取平均作为结果。 我们把第 k 次测量得到的直径记为 x_k，前 k 次结果的平均值记为 \hat x_k，那么就有 x^k=1k∑i=1kxi=1k(x1+x2+⋯+xk−1)+1kxk=k−1k1k−1(x1+x2+⋯+xk−1)+1kxk=k−1kx^k−1+1kxk=x^k−1+1k(xk−x^k−1)\begin{aligned} \hat x_k&=\frac{1}{k}\sum_{i=1}^k x_i\\ &=\frac1k(x_1+x_2+\dots+x_{k-1})+\frac1kx_k\\ &=\frac{k-1}{k}\frac1{k-1}(x_1+x_2+\dots+x_{k-1})+\frac1kx_k\\ &=\frac{k-1}{k}\hat x_{k-1}+\frac1kx_k\\ &=\hat x_{k-1}+\frac1k(x_k-\hat x_{k-1}) \end{aligned} x^k​​=k1​i=1∑k​xi​=k1​(x1​+x2​+⋯+xk−1​)+k1​xk​=kk−1​k−11​(x1​+x2​+⋯+xk−1​)+k1​xk​=kk−1​x^k−1​+k1​xk​=x^k−1​+k1​(xk​−x^k−1​)​ 从这个式子中，我们引出卡尔曼滤波器的核心式子： x^k=x^k−1+kk(xk−x^k−1)\hat x_k=\hat x_{k-1}+k_k(x_k-\hat x_{k-1}) x^k​=x^k−1​+kk​(xk​−x^k−1​) kkk_kkk​ 被称为卡尔曼增益（Kalman Gain）。 Data Fusion 数据融合 我们仍然从例子入手。假定我们第一次测量得到的硬币直径 x1=30mmx_{1}=30mmx1​=30mm，且（假设）服从正态分布 σ=2mm\sigma=2mmσ=2mm；第二次测量得到的硬币直径 x2=32mmx_2=32mmx2​=32mm，且服从正态分布 σ=4mm\sigma=4mmσ=4mm。现在我们想要知道硬币的直径。 我们可以通过直觉猜测真正的硬币直径 x∈[30,32]x\in[30,32]x∈[30,32]，并且更靠近 30mm30mm30mm（因为它的方差更小）。不过因为我们难以得到准确的值，所以我们只能计算硬币直径最可能是多少。也就是说，如果我们把两次测量，第一次当作初始值，第二次当作修正，那么预测的真实值 x=x1+k(x2−x1)x=x_1+k(x_2-x_1)x=x1​+k(x2​−x1​)，最可能意味着我们要求出 kkk 使得 Var(x)Var(x)Var(x) 最小。 Var(x)=Var((1−k)x1+kx2)=Var((1−k)x1)+Var(kx2)=(1−k)2Var(x1)+k2Var(x2)=(1−k)2σ12+k2σ22\begin{aligned} Var(x)&=Var((1-k)x_1+kx_2)\\ &=Var((1-k)x_1)+Var(kx_2)\\ &=(1-k)^2Var(x_1)+k^2Var(x_2)\\ &=(1-k)^2\sigma_1^2+k^2\sigma_2^2 \end{aligned} Var(x)​=Var((1−k)x1​+kx2​)=Var((1−k)x1​)+Var(kx2​)=(1−k)2Var(x1​)+k2Var(x2​)=(1−k)2σ12​+k2σ22​​ 取最小的时候上式对 kkk 的导数为 000，那么 ddxVar(x)=2(k−1)σ12+2kσ22=0\begin{aligned} \frac{\mathrm d}{\mathrm dx}Var(x)&=2(k-1)\sigma_1^2+2k\sigma_2^2=0 \end{aligned} dxd​Var(x)​=2(k−1)σ12​+2kσ22​=0​ 解得 k=σ12σ12+σ22k=\frac{\sigma_1^2}{\sigma_1^2+\sigma_2^2} k=σ12​+σ22​σ12​​ 先前我们提到卡尔曼滤波器的式子 x^k=x^k−1+kk(xk−x^k−1)\hat x_k=\hat x_{k-1}+k_k(x_k-\hat x_{k-1}) x^k​=x^k−1​+kk​(xk​−x^k−1​) Covariance Matrix 协方差矩阵 是将方差和协方差在同一个矩阵里表现出来，体现变量之间的变化关系。 协方差用于衡量两个变量的总体误差。 Cov(X,Y)=E[(X−E[X])(Y−E[Y])]=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y]Cov(X,Y)=E[(X-E[X])(Y-E[Y])]=E[XY]-E[X]E[Y] Cov(X,Y)=E[(X−E[X])(Y−E[Y])]=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y] 协方差矩阵就是这样一种矩阵：主对角线上是变量的方差，其他位置上是对应变量的协方差。这里用 σiσj\sigma_i\sigma_jσi​σj​ 表示 Cov(xi,xj)Cov(x_i,x_j)Cov(xi​,xj​)，意义是协方差而不是标准差的乘积。 P=[σ12σ1σ2…σ1σnσ2σ1σ22…σ2σn⋮⋮⋱⋮σnσ1σnσ2…σn2]P= \begin{bmatrix} \sigma_1^2&\sigma_1\sigma_2&\dots&\sigma_1\sigma_n\\ \sigma_2\sigma_1&\sigma_2^2&\dots&\sigma_2\sigma_n\\ \vdots&\vdots&\ddots&\vdots\\ \sigma_n\sigma_1&\sigma_n\sigma_2&\dots&\sigma_n^2 \end{bmatrix} P=⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎡​σ12​σ2​σ1​⋮σn​σ1​​σ1​σ2​σ22​⋮σn​σ2​​……⋱…​σ1​σn​σ2​σn​⋮σn2​​⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎤​ 那么我们怎么计算这个协方差矩阵呢？我们首先求出一个过渡矩阵 AAA，变量矩阵减去平均值矩阵 A=[a1b1…z1a2b2…z2⋮⋮⋱⋮anbn…zn]−1n[11…111…1⋮⋮⋱⋮11…1][a1b1…z1a2b2…z2⋮⋮⋱⋮anbn…zn]A= \begin{bmatrix} a_1&b_1&\dots&z_1\\ a_2&b_2&\dots&z_2\\ \vdots&\vdots&\ddots&\vdots\\ a_n&b_n&\dots&z_n \end{bmatrix} -\frac1n \begin{bmatrix} 1&1&\dots&1\\ 1&1&\dots&1\\ \vdots&\vdots&\ddots&\vdots\\ 1&1&\dots&1 \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} a_1&b_1&\dots&z_1\\ a_2&b_2&\dots&z_2\\ \vdots&\vdots&\ddots&\vdots\\ a_n&b_n&\dots&z_n \end{bmatrix} A=⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎡​a1​a2​⋮an​​b1​b2​⋮bn​​……⋱…​z1​z2​⋮zn​​⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎤​−n1​⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎡​11⋮1​11⋮1​……⋱…​11⋮1​⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎤​⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎡​a1​a2​⋮an​​b1​b2​⋮bn​​……⋱…​z1​z2​⋮zn​​⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎤​ 随后再使用 AAA 来计算 PPP。 P=1nATAP=\frac1nA^TA P=n1​ATA State Space Representation 状态空间方程 我们从一个关于 xxx 位移的力学微分方程入手：ax′′+bx′+cx=Fax''+bx'+cx=Fax′′+bx′+cx=F。给定 a,b,ca,b,ca,b,c 系数，让力 FFF 作为系统的输入，让位移 xxx 作为输出。 我们首先确定两个状态变量，我们令 x1=x,x2=x′x_1=x,x_2=x'x1​=x,x2​=x′，那么我们就可以用两个一阶微分方程来表示二阶微分方程。（这两个 x1,x2x_1,x_2x1​,x2​ 我们无法观测，我们是从理论的角度，认为 x1,x2x_1,x_2x1​,x2​ 控制了 x1′=x2x2′=x′′=1aF−1abx2−1acx1\begin{aligned} x_1'&=x_2\\ x_2'&=x''=\frac1aF-\frac1abx_2-\frac1acx_1 \end{aligned} x1′​x2′​​=x2​=x′′=a1​F−a1​bx2​−a1​cx1​​ 假定我们还有测量量 z1=x=x1z2=x′=x2z_1=x=x_1\\z_2=x'=x_2 z1​=x=x1​z2​=x′=x2​ 我们用矩阵表示上述四个式子 \begin{aligned} \begin{bmatrix} x_1'\\x_2' \end{bmatrix} &= \begin{bmatrix} 0&1\\ -\frac {c}{a}&-\frac {b}{a} \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} x_1\\x_2 \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} 0\ -\frac{1}{a} \end{bmatrix} F \ \begin{bmatrix} z_1\z_2 \end{bmatrix} &= \begin{bmatrix} 1&0\ 0&1 \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} x_1\x_2 \end{bmatrix} \end{aligned} 归纳一下就是 X′(t)=AX(t)+BU(t)Z(t)=HX(t)X'(t)=AX(t)+BU(t)\\ Z(t)=HX(t) X′(t)=AX(t)+BU(t)Z(t)=HX(t) 其中 U(t)U(t)U(t) 是系统输入随时间的函数，A,B,HA,B,HA,B,H 都是矩阵。也可以写成离散形式 Xt′=AXt−1+BUt−1X'_t=AX_{t-1}+BU_{t-1}Xt′​=AXt−1​+BUt−1​，这里的 111 表示 sample time 采样时间，不过 A,B,HA,B,HA,B,H 就需要进行相应的计算修改。 不过我们还要考虑各种过程中产生的误差、不确定性，我们还要加入一个过程噪音 w(t)w(t)w(t)（假设的数学模型不能完美预测）和测量噪音 v(t)v(t)v(t)（测量的不准确性） X′(t)=AX(t)+BU(t)+W(t)Z(t)=HX(t)+V(t)X'(t)=AX(t)+BU(t)+W(t)\\ Z(t)=HX(t)+V(t) X′(t)=AX(t)+BU(t)+W(t)Z(t)=HX(t)+V(t) 现在我们有一个不太准的计算结果、一个不太准的测量结果，我们想要计算出一个虽然也不太准但是相对来说准确一些的结果，我们就需要 Data Fusion 融合一下，这就是 Kalman Filter 做的事。 数学推导 卡尔曼增益 Kalman Gain 我们先写下状态空间方程的离散形式 Xk=AXk−1+Buk−1+Wk−1Zk=HXk+Vk\boxed{ \begin{aligned} X_k&=AX_{k-1}+Bu_{k-1}+W_{k-1}\\ Z_k&=HX_k+V_k \end{aligned} } Xk​Zk​​=AXk−1​+Buk−1​+Wk−1​=HXk​+Vk​​​ 自然界的噪声是不可测的，一般来说，我们可以假设自然界的过程噪声 WWW 服从正态分布 p(W)∼N(0,Q)p(W)\sim\mathcal N(0,Q)p(W)∼N(0,Q)，其中 000 是期望，QQQ 是协方差矩阵，wiw_iwi​ 服从正态分布 p(wi)∼N(μi,σi2)p(w_i)\sim\mathcal N(\mu_i,\sigma_i^2)p(wi​)∼N(μi​,σi2​) 【证明】： Q=E[WWT]\boxed{Q=E[WW^T]} Q=E[WWT]​ 我们考虑过程噪声 W=[w1w2…wn]TW=\begin{bmatrix}w_1&w_2&\dots&w_n\end{bmatrix}^TW=[w1​​w2​​…​wn​​]T，那么有 WWT=[w12w1w2…w1wnw2w1w22…w2wn⋮⋮⋱⋮wnw1wnw2…wn2]WW^T= \begin{bmatrix} w_1^2&w_1w_2&\dots&w_1w_n\\ w_2w_1&w_2^2&\dots&w_2w_n\\ \vdots&\vdots&\ddots&\vdots\\ w_nw_1&w_nw_2&\dots&w_n^2 \end{bmatrix} WWT=⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎡​w12​w2​w1​⋮wn​w1​​w1​w2​w22​⋮wn​w2​​……⋱…​w1​wn​w2​wn​⋮wn2​​⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎤​ E[WWT]E[WW^T]E[WWT] 就是对每一个矩阵元素都求一次期望 E[WWT]=[E[w12]E[w1w2]…E[w1wn]E[w2w1]E[w22]…E[w2wn]⋮⋮⋱⋮E[wnw1]E[wnw2]…E[wn2]]E[WW^T]= \begin{bmatrix} E[w_1^2]&E[w_1w_2]&\dots&E[w_1w_n]\\ E[w_2w_1]&E[w_2^2]&\dots&E[w_2w_n]\\ \vdots&\vdots&\ddots&\vdots\\ E[w_nw_1]&E[w_nw_2]&\dots&E[w_n^2] \end{bmatrix} E[WWT]=⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎡​E[w12​]E[w2​w1​]⋮E[wn​w1​]​E[w1​w2​]E[w22​]⋮E[wn​w2​]​……⋱…​E[w1​wn​]E[w2​wn​]⋮E[wn2​]​⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎤​ 由于 Cov(X,Y)=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y]Cov(X,Y)=E[XY]-E[X]E[Y]Cov(X,Y)=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y] 并且 E[wi]=0E[w_i]=0E[wi​]=0。当 X=Y=wiX=Y=w_iX=Y=wi​ 时，Cov(wi,wi)=E[wi2]Cov(w_i,w_i)=E[w_i^2]Cov(wi​,wi​)=E[wi2​]；当 X≠YX e YX=Y A=[∇x1f1∇x2f1∇x2f2∇x2f2]∣x^k−1,uk−1=[1cos⁡x22x10]∣x^k−1,uk−1A=[1cos⁡x^2,k−12x^1,k−10]\begin{aligned} A&= \begin{bmatrix} abla_{x_1}f_1& abla_{x_2}f_1\\ abla_{x_2}f_2& abla_{x_2}f_2 \end{bmatrix}\Bigg|_{\hat x_{k-1},u_{k-1}}\\ &= \begin{bmatrix} 1&\cos x_2\\ 2x_1&0 \end{bmatrix}\Bigg|_{\hat x_{k-1},u_{k-1}}\\ A&= \begin{bmatrix} 1&\cos \hat x_{2,k-1}\\ 2\hat x_{1,k-1}&0 \end{bmatrix} \end{aligned} AA​=[∇x1​​f1​∇x2​​f2​​∇x2​​f1​∇x2​​f2​​]∣∣∣∣∣∣​x^k−1​,uk−1​​=[12x1​​cosx2​0​]∣∣∣∣∣∣​x^k−1​,uk−1​​=[12x^1,k−1​​cosx^2,k−1​0​]​ 我们将第二个方程在 f(x^k−1,uk−1,0)=x~kf(\hat x_{k-1},u_{k-1},0)=\tilde x_kf(x^k−1​,uk−1​,0)=x~k​ 处线性化 zk=h(x~k,vk)+H(xk−x~k)+Vvkz_k=h(\tilde x_k,v_k)+H(x_k-\tilde x_k)+Vv_k zk​=h(x~k​,vk​)+H(xk​−x~k​)+Vvk​ 同样的处理，记 z~k=h(x~k,0)\tilde z_k=h(\tilde x_k,0)z~k​=h(x~k​,0)，H=∇xh∣x^kH= abla_x h|_{\hat x_{k}}H=∇x​h∣x^k​​，V=∇vh∣x^kV= abla_v h|_{\hat x_k}V=∇v​h∣x^k​​ 综合以上，我们就可以把两个方程分别在 x^k−1\hat x_{k-1}x^k−1​ 附近和 x~k\tilde x_kx~k​ 附近线性化了，最终得到 xk=x~k+A(xk−1−x^k−1)+Wwk−1zk=z~k+H(xk−x~k)+Vvk\boxed{\begin{aligned} x_k&=\tilde x_{k}+A(x_{k-1}-\hat x_{k-1})+Ww_{k-1} \\ z_k&=\tilde z_k+H(x_k-\tilde x_k)+Vv_k \end{aligned}} xk​zk​​=x~k​+A(xk−1​−x^k−1​)+Wwk−1​=z~k​+H(xk​−x~k​)+Vvk​​​ 要注意的是，wiw_iwi​ 服从正态分布 p(wi)∼N(0,Q)p(w_i)\sim\mathcal N(0,Q)p(wi​)∼N(0,Q)，而与 WWW 相乘之后也服从正态分布 p(Wwi)∼N(0,WQWT)p(Ww_i)\sim\mathcal N(0,WQW^T)p(Wwi​)∼N(0,WQWT)；类似的有 p(vi)∼N(0,R)p(v_i)\sim\mathcal N(0,R)p(vi​)∼N(0,R)，p(Vvi)∼N(0,VRVT)p(Vv_i)\sim\mathcal N(0,VRV^T)p(Vvi​)∼N(0,VRVT) p(wi)∼N(0,Q)p(Wwi)∼N(0,WQWT)p(vi)∼N(0,R)p(Vvi)∼N(0,VRVT)\boxed{ \begin{aligned} p(w_i)&\sim\mathcal N(0,Q)\\ p(Ww_i)&\sim\mathcal N(0,WQW^T)\\ p(v_i)&\sim\mathcal N(0,R)\\ p(Vv_i)&\sim\mathcal N(0,VRV^T) \end{aligned} } p(wi​)p(Wwi​)p(vi​)p(Vvi​)​∼N(0,Q)∼N(0,WQWT)∼N(0,R)∼N(0,VRVT)​​ EKF 下的预测与校正 步骤\滤波类型 KF 卡尔曼滤波器 EKF 扩展卡尔曼滤波器 计算先验估计 x^k−=\hat x_k^- =x^k−​= Ax^k−1+Buk−1A\hat x_{k-1}+Bu_{k-1}Ax^k−1​+Buk−1​ f(x^k−1,uk−1,0)f(\hat x_{k-1},u_{k-1},0)f(x^k−1​,uk−1​,0) 计算先验误差协方差矩阵 Pk−=P_k^-=Pk−​= APk−1AT+QAP_{k-1}A^T+QAPk−1​AT+Q APk−1AT+WQWTAP_{k-1}A^T+WQW^TAPk−1​AT+WQWT 计算卡尔曼增益 kk=k_k=kk​= Pk−HTHPk−HT+R\frac{P_k^-H^T}{HP_k^-H^T+R}HPk−​HT+RPk−​HT​ Pk−HTHPk−HT+VRVT\frac{P_k^-H^T}{HP_k^-H^T+VRV^T}HPk−​HT+VRVTPk−​HT​ 后验估计 x^k=\hat x_k=x^k​= x^k−+kk(Zk−Hx^k−)\hat x_k^-+k_k(Z_k-H\hat x_k^-)x^k−​+kk​(Zk​−Hx^k−​) x^k−+kk(Zk−h(x^k−,0))\hat x_k^-+k_k\Big(Z_k-h(\hat x_k^-,0)\Big)x^k−​+kk​(Zk​−h(x^k−​,0)) 后验误差协方差矩阵 Pk=P_k=Pk​= (I−kkH)Pk−(I-k_kH)P_k^-(I−kk​H)Pk−​ (I−kkH)Pk−(I-k_kH)P_k^-(I−kk​H)Pk−​

title: 粒子滤波 Particle Filter
content: 粒子滤波 Particle Filter 参考： https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1wW411S7mn https://www.math.pku.edu.cn/teachers/lidf/docs/statcomp/html/_statcompbook/sim-sis.html 重要概念 动态模型 Dynamic Model (状态空间模型State Base Model) 对于要观测的东西 xix_ixi​，

title: 牛客小白月赛 93 题解
content: 牛客小白月赛 93 题解 比赛链接 A. 生不逢七 签到题。下一个数就是 +n+n+n，判断数位和倍数就 ok。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() { int n, a, k; cin >> n >> a >> k; auto func = [&](int num) { if (num % 7 == 0) return true; while (num != 0) { if (num % 10 == 7) return true; num /= 10; } return false; }; a++; for (int i = 0; i < k; i++, a += n) { if (func(a)) cout << "p "; else cout << a << " "; } cout << endl;}int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr); int t = 1; cin >> t; while (t--) solve(); return 0;} B. 交换数字 数学知识：两个正整数的差越大，乘积越小。 有了这个之后这题就可以秒了。令 A<BA<BA<B，则对于每一个数位都判断要不要交换（让 AAA 尽可能小）。交换完之后直接乘起来。 这里为了防止溢出，用秦九韶算法不断 ×10+a\times10+a×10+a 再取模计算。 #include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "template <int P = 998244353>class Mint { using i64 = long long; // using i128 = __uint128_t; using ValueType = int; private: ValueType x; public: template <typename T> constexpr static T fast_pow(T base, ll power) { Mint res = 1; while (power > 0) { if (power & 1) res = res * base; base = base * base; power >>= 1; } return res; } // Constructor constexpr Mint() : x{0} {} constexpr Mint(int v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} constexpr Mint(long long v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} // constexpr Mint(__int128_t v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} constexpr Mint(const Mint &i) { this->x = i.val(); } constexpr Mint(Mint &i) { this->x = i.val(); } constexpr Mint(Mint &&i) { this->x = i.val(); } // Modulo related static ValueType getMod() { if (P > 0) return P; } // Normalize constexpr ValueType norm(ValueType x) const { if (x < 0) x += getMod(); else if (x >= getMod()) x -= getMod(); return x; } constexpr ValueType val() const { return x; } // Type Convertor explicit constexpr operator int() const { return int(x); } explicit constexpr operator long long() const { return (long long)(x); } /* Arithmetic */ // Negative sign constexpr Mint operator-() const { Mint res; res.x = norm(getMod() - x); return res; } // Inverse constexpr Mint inv() const { return fast_pow(*this, getMod() - 2); } constexpr Mint &operator*=(Mint rhs) & { // x = 1LL * x * rhs.val() % getMod(); ValueType r = x * rhs.val() - P * (int)(1.L / P * x * rhs.val()); x = r - P * (r >= P) + P * (r < 0); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator+=(Mint rhs) & { x = norm(x + rhs.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator-=(Mint rhs) & { x = norm(x - rhs.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator/=(Mint rhs) & { return *this *= rhs.inv(); } constexpr Mint &operator=(Mint rhs) & { this->x = rhs.val(); return *this; } friend constexpr Mint operator*(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res *= rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator+(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res += rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator-(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res -= rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator/(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res /= rhs; return res; } /* Input Output */ friend constexpr std::istream &operator>>(std::istream &is, Mint &a) { ValueType v; is >> v; a = Mint(v); return is; } friend constexpr std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Mint &a) { return os << a.val(); } /* Bool Judges */ friend constexpr bool operator==(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() == rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator!=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() != rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator<(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() < rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator>(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() > rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator<=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() <= rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator>=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() >= rhs.val(); } /* Advanced Arithmetic */ constexpr Mint &operator++() & { this->x = this->norm(this->x + 1); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator--() & { this->x = this->norm(this->x - 1); return *this; } constexpr Mint operator++(int) { auto f = Mint(x); this->x = this->norm(this->x + 1); return f; } constexpr Mint operator--(int) { auto f = Mint(x); this->x = this->norm(this->x - 1); return f; } constexpr Mint &operator^=(const Mint &a) & { *this = fast_pow(*this, a.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint operator^(const Mint &a) const { auto f = Mint(this->x); f ^= a; return f; }};using Z = Mint<>;void solve() { int n; string a, b; Z xa = 0, xb = 0; cin >> n >> a >> b; Z base = 10; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (a[i] > b[i]) swap(a[i], b[i]); xa = xa * base + Z(a[i] - '0'); xb = xb * base + Z(b[i] - '0'); } cout << xa * xb;}int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr); ll t = 1; // cin >> t; while (t--) solve(); return 0;} C. 老虎机 最纯正的高考数学概率题。其实就简单的排列组合。 aaa 元的情况：1m3m(m−1)(m−2)\frac 1{m^3}m(m-1)(m-2)m31​m(m−1)(m−2) bbb 元的情况：1m3(31)m(m−1)\frac{1}{m^3}\binom{3}{1}m(m-1)m31​(13​)m(m−1) ccc 元的情况：1m3m\frac1{m^3}mm31​m 然后就是找个带模整数板子一套。 #include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "template <int P = 998244353>class Mint { using i64 = long long; // using i128 = __uint128_t; using ValueType = int; private: ValueType x; public: template <typename T> constexpr static T fast_pow(T base, ll power) { Mint res = 1; while (power > 0) { if (power & 1) res = res * base; base = base * base; power >>= 1; } return res; } // Constructor constexpr Mint() : x{0} {} constexpr Mint(int v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} constexpr Mint(long long v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} // constexpr Mint(__int128_t v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} constexpr Mint(const Mint &i) { this->x = i.val(); } constexpr Mint(Mint &i) { this->x = i.val(); } constexpr Mint(Mint &&i) { this->x = i.val(); } // Modulo related static ValueType getMod() { if (P > 0) return P; } // Normalize constexpr ValueType norm(ValueType x) const { if (x < 0) x += getMod(); else if (x >= getMod()) x -= getMod(); return x; } constexpr ValueType val() const { return x; } // Type Convertor explicit constexpr operator int() const { return int(x); } explicit constexpr operator long long() const { return (long long)(x); } /* Arithmetic */ // Negative sign constexpr Mint operator-() const { Mint res; res.x = norm(getMod() - x); return res; } // Inverse constexpr Mint inv() const { return fast_pow(*this, getMod() - 2); } constexpr Mint &operator*=(Mint rhs) & { // x = 1LL * x * rhs.val() % getMod(); ValueType r = x * rhs.val() - P * (int)(1.L / P * x * rhs.val()); x = r - P * (r >= P) + P * (r < 0); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator+=(Mint rhs) & { x = norm(x + rhs.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator-=(Mint rhs) & { x = norm(x - rhs.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator/=(Mint rhs) & { return *this *= rhs.inv(); } constexpr Mint &operator=(Mint rhs) & { this->x = rhs.val(); return *this; } friend constexpr Mint operator*(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res *= rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator+(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res += rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator-(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res -= rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator/(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res /= rhs; return res; } /* Input Output */ friend constexpr std::istream &operator>>(std::istream &is, Mint &a) { ValueType v; is >> v; a = Mint(v); return is; } friend constexpr std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Mint &a) { return os << a.val(); } /* Bool Judges */ friend constexpr bool operator==(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() == rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator!=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() != rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator<(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() < rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator>(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() > rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator<=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() <= rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator>=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() >= rhs.val(); } /* Advanced Arithmetic */ constexpr Mint &operator++() & { this->x = this->norm(this->x + 1); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator--() & { this->x = this->norm(this->x - 1); return *this; } constexpr Mint operator++(int) { auto f = Mint(x); this->x = this->norm(this->x + 1); return f; } constexpr Mint operator--(int) { auto f = Mint(x); this->x = this->norm(this->x - 1); return f; } constexpr Mint &operator^=(const Mint &a) & { *this = fast_pow(*this, a.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint operator^(const Mint &a) const { auto f = Mint(this->x); f ^= a; return f; }};using Z = Mint<>;void solve() { Z m, a, b, c; cin >> m >> a >> b >> c; cout << (a * m * (m - 1) * (m - 2) + b * (m * 3) * (m - 1) + c * (m)) / (m ^ 3) << endl;}int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr); int t = 1; cin >> t; while (t--) solve(); return 0;} D. 幻兽帕鲁 一个重要的性质，需要自己手推：将工号的二进制首尾翻转之后，就是最终的位置。 偶数位放在前，奇数位放在后，本质就是二进制末尾为 000 放在前，为 111 放在后。递归操作后，考虑前一半区间，仍然奇数位在后，此时就是第二位为 111 才是奇数位了。 然后结束了。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() { int n, m; cin >> n >> m; while (m--) { ll x; cin >> x; ll ans = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if ((x >> i) & 1) { ans += (1ll << (n - 1 - i)); } } cout << ans << endl; }}int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr); ll t = 1; // cin >> t; while (t--) solve(); return 0;} E. 奏绝 可以使用线段树降低思维复杂度。题目的影响值可以通过下标做差得到，那么区间的子区间影响值之和可以通过下标的和之间做差得到。这是线段树解题的核心。 我们定义一个线段树节点： 1234567struct Node { Z num_w; // 区间内白点个数 Z num_b; // 区间内黑点个数 Z sum_iw; // 区间内白点的下标和 Z sum_ib; // 区间内黑点的下标和 Z ans; // 区间影响值（答案）}; 那么这个 ans 该如何计算呢？每一个左儿子的黑点会与所有右儿子的白点产生影响值（b.sum_ib * a.num_w - b.num_w * a.sum_ib），每一个左儿子的白点会与所有右儿子的黑点产生影响值（b.sum_iw * a.num_b - b.num_b * a.sum_iw），再加上各自区间的影响值。 然后就是静态线段树的建树、查询了。 #include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "const ll mod = 998244353;template <int P = 998244353>class Mint { using i64 = long long; // using i128 = __uint128_t; using ValueType = int; private: ValueType x; public: template <typename T> constexpr static T fast_pow(T base, ll power) { Mint res = 1; while (power > 0) { if (power & 1) res = res * base; base = base * base; power >>= 1; } return res; } // Constructor constexpr Mint() : x{0} {} constexpr Mint(int v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} constexpr Mint(long long v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} // constexpr Mint(__int128_t v) : x{norm(v % getMod())} {} constexpr Mint(const Mint &i) { this->x = i.val(); } constexpr Mint(Mint &i) { this->x = i.val(); } constexpr Mint(Mint &&i) { this->x = i.val(); } // Modulo related static ValueType getMod() { if (P > 0) return P; } // Normalize constexpr ValueType norm(ValueType x) const { if (x < 0) x += getMod(); else if (x >= getMod()) x -= getMod(); return x; } constexpr ValueType val() const { return x; } // Type Convertor explicit constexpr operator int() const { return int(x); } explicit constexpr operator long long() const { return (long long)(x); } /* Arithmetic */ // Negative sign constexpr Mint operator-() const { Mint res; res.x = norm(getMod() - x); return res; } // Inverse constexpr Mint inv() const { return fast_pow(*this, getMod() - 2); } constexpr Mint &operator*=(Mint rhs) & { // x = 1LL * x * rhs.val() % getMod(); ValueType r = x * rhs.val() - P * (int)(1.L / P * x * rhs.val()); x = r - P * (r >= P) + P * (r < 0); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator+=(Mint rhs) & { x = norm(x + rhs.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator-=(Mint rhs) & { x = norm(x - rhs.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator/=(Mint rhs) & { return *this *= rhs.inv(); } constexpr Mint &operator=(Mint rhs) & { this->x = rhs.val(); return *this; } friend constexpr Mint operator*(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res *= rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator+(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res += rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator-(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res -= rhs; return res; } friend constexpr Mint operator/(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { Mint res = lhs; res /= rhs; return res; } /* Input Output */ friend constexpr std::istream &operator>>(std::istream &is, Mint &a) { ValueType v; is >> v; a = Mint(v); return is; } friend constexpr std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Mint &a) { return os << a.val(); } /* Bool Judges */ friend constexpr bool operator==(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() == rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator!=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() != rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator<(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() < rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator>(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() > rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator<=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() <= rhs.val(); } friend constexpr bool operator>=(Mint lhs, Mint rhs) { return lhs.val() >= rhs.val(); } /* Advanced Arithmetic */ constexpr Mint &operator++() & { this->x = this->norm(this->x + 1); return *this; } constexpr Mint &operator--() & { this->x = this->norm(this->x - 1); return *this; } constexpr Mint operator++(int) { auto f = Mint(x); this->x = this->norm(this->x + 1); return f; } constexpr Mint operator--(int) { auto f = Mint(x); this->x = this->norm(this->x - 1); return f; } constexpr Mint &operator^=(const Mint &a) & { *this = fast_pow(*this, a.val()); return *this; } constexpr Mint operator^(const Mint &a) const { auto f = Mint(this->x); f ^= a; return f; }};using Z = Mint<>;struct Node { Z num_w; Z num_b; Z sum_iw; Z sum_ib; Z ans;};Node renew(Node a, Node b) { Node ret; ret.num_w = a.num_w + b.num_w; ret.num_b = a.num_b + b.num_b; ret.sum_iw = a.sum_iw + b.sum_iw; ret.sum_ib = a.sum_ib + b.sum_ib; ret.ans = b.sum_iw * a.num_b - b.num_b * a.sum_iw + b.sum_ib * a.num_w - b.num_w * a.sum_ib + b.ans + a.ans; return ret;}string c;int n;vector<Node> tr;void pullup(int p) { tr[p] = renew(tr[p << 1], tr[p << 1 | 1]); }void build(int p = 1, int l = 0, int r = n - 1) { if (l == r) { tr[p] = { ll(c[l] == '0'), ll(c[l] == '1'), (l + 1) * (c[l] == '0'), (l + 1) * (c[l] == '1'), 0, }; return; } int m = l + ((r - l) >> 1); build(p << 1, l, m); build(p << 1 | 1, m + 1, r); pullup(p);}Node ask(int ql, int qr, int p = 1, int l = 0, int r = n - 1) { if (ql <= l && r <= qr) return tr[p]; int m = l + ((r - l) >> 1); if (qr <= m) return ask(ql, qr, p << 1, l, m); else if (m < ql) return ask(ql, qr, p << 1 | 1, m + 1, r); else { return renew(ask(ql, qr, p << 1, l, m), ask(ql, qr, p << 1 | 1, m + 1, r)); }}void solve() { int q; cin >> n >> q; cin >> c; tr.resize(n << 2); build(); while (q--) { int a, b; cin >> a >> b; a--, b--; cout << ask(a, b).ans << endl; }}int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr); ll t = 1; // cin >> t; while (t--) solve(); return 0;} F. 本初字符串 一个 O(n)O(n)O(n) 的做法是，枚举 TTT 的长度，然后将 SSS 和 TTT 都延长到 lcm(∣S∣,∣T∣)\mathop{lcm}(|S|,|T|)lcm(∣S∣,∣T∣)，然后从前往后枚举第 iii 个位置的字符（其匹配次数 cnt），用 sumsumsum 表示 1∼i−11\sim i-11∼i−1 位置的字符的匹配次数，用 suf[i+1] 表示 i+1∼ni+1\sim ni+1∼n 位置的字符最大可能匹配多少次，那么 2*(cnt+sum+suf[i+1])>=n 则说明 TTT 的第 iii 个位置可以填这个字符。 这个方法的时间复杂度：O(n)O(n)O(n) 枚举长度，每次循环里 O(n)O(n)O(n) 统计 cnt 、后缀和、枚举 iii 位置的字符，所以总计 O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2). 那么我们考虑优化。优化的点就在于：∣T∣|T|∣T∣ 应该是 ∣S∣|S|∣S∣ 的因子。令 ∣S∣=n|S|=n∣S∣=n 固定，∣T1∣=m|T_1|=m∣T1​∣=m、∣T2∣=m0|T_2|=m_0∣T2​∣=m0​，其中 gcd⁡(n,m)=m0≠m\gcd(n,m)=m_0 e mgcd(n,m)=m0​=m。我们考虑 T2T_2T2​ 的第 iii 位，并写出和它匹配的 SjS_jSj​：{j:j=i+km0}\{j:j=i+km_0\}{j:j=i+km0​}。因为 ∣T1∣|T_1|∣T1​∣ 是 ∣T2∣|T_2|∣T2​∣ 的倍数，所以要同时考虑 T1:Ti+m0,i+2m0,…T_1:T_{i+m_0,i+2m_0,\dots}T1​:Ti+m0​,i+2m0​,…​。写下来就可以发现，匹配位置的集合是相同的。因此，我们只需要长度更短的即可（其字典序也更小）。 这样的时间复杂度是 O(n⋅d(n))O(n\cdot d(n))O(n⋅d(n))，其中 d(n)d(n)d(n) 是 nnn 的因子个数。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	string o;	int n;	cin >> o;	n = o.length();	// Check possible answer length	auto check = [&](int len) { vector<vi> cnt(len, vi(30, 0)); vi suf(len + 1, 0); // Counting for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { cnt[i % len][o[i] - 'a']++; // Max matching, so that more likely to satisfy the requirement suf[i % len] = max(suf[i % len], cnt[i % len][o[i] - 'a']); } // Suffix sum for (int i = len - 2; i >= 0; i--) { suf[i] += suf[i + 1]; } string ans; if (2 * suf[0] < n) return false; // Less than half int sum = 0; for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < 26; j++) { // If more than half ... if (2 * (cnt[i][j] + sum + suf[i + 1]) >= n) { // Since we enumerate from front to end // and lexicographically from small to big // if is true, this is the smallest in lexicographical order. sum += cnt[i][j]; ans.push_back('a' + j); break; } } } cout << ans << endl; return true;	};	for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { if (n % i != 0) continue; if (check(i)) break;	}}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;}

title: 牛客周赛 Round 43
content: 牛客周赛 Round 43 题解 周赛链接 这一场比较简单，两道语法，两道基础算法，两道计算几何。 A. 小红平分糖果 签到题。是偶数就 ok，否则 −1-1−1. 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	int n;	cin >> n;	if (n & 1) cout << "-1 ";	else cout << n / 2 << ' ' << n / 2 << endl;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	// cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} B. 小红的完全平方数 先找到离 xxx 最近的两个完全平方数，保证奇偶性相同。然后考虑到先 +2+2+2 再 −2-2−2 相当于不变，因此要么一直 +2+2+2 要么一直 −2-2−2。分别计算距离哪个平方数更近即可。 计算 <x<x<x 的奇偶性相同的平方数：	ll a = sqrt(n); if ((a & 1) != (n & 1)) a--; 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334#include <array>#include <cmath>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	ll n;	cin >> n;	ll a = sqrt(n);	if ((a & 1) != (n & 1)) a--;	cout << min(abs(n - a * a) / 2, abs((a + 2) * (a + 2) - n) / 2) << endl;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	// cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} C. 小苯的字符串变化 由于要求前一半全大写，后一半全小写，我们可以枚举大写小写的分界点，用前缀和判断需要修改几个字符。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748#include <array>#include <cctype>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	string s;	cin >> s;	int n = s.length();	vi upp(n + 1, 0), low(n + 1, 0);	// ?[i]=1~i,inclusive, ?[0]=0 for simplicity	for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { upp[i] = upp[i - 1]; low[i] = low[i - 1]; upp[i] += int(s[i - 1] >= 'A' && s[i - 1] <= 'Z'); low[i] += int(s[i - 1] >= 'a' && s[i - 1] <= 'z');	}	// assume [1, i] is upper, [i+1, n] is lower	int ans = inf;	for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { ans = min(ans, low[i] + upp[n] - upp[i]);	}	cout << ans;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	// cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} D. 小红的子数组排列判断 因为数组是连续的 kkk 个，这和滑动窗口的思想比较类似。所以我们维护一个滑动窗口，用 std::set 维护窗口内没有出现的元素。那么，如果 set 为空，说明刚好是 1∼k1\sim k1∼k 的排列，每次拓展窗口，cnt 计数器 +1+1+1 把这个数从 set 中删掉；缩小窗口时，cnt 计数器 −1-1−1，如果减到 000，那么重新放入 set。 时间复杂度：每个元素插入、弹出 set 至多一次，时间复杂度 O(nlog⁡n)O(n\log n)O(nlogn)。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869#include <algorithm>#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <set>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	int n, k;	vi num;	cin >> n >> k;	for (int i = 0, a; i < n; i++) { cin >> a; num.push_back(a);	}	set<int> les; // Hasn't occurred	vi cnt(n + 1, 0); // count no. of occurrence	for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) les.insert(i);	for (int i = 0; i < k - 1; i++) { if (cnt[num[i]] == 0) { les.erase(les.lower_bound(num[i])); } cnt[num[i]]++;	}	int ans = 0;	for (int i = k - 1; i < n; i++) { // Extend the sliding window to k-size if (cnt[num[i]] == 0) { les.erase(les.lower_bound(num[i])); } cnt[num[i]]++; // for (auto x : les) cout << x << " "; // cout << endl; if (les.size() == 0) ans++; // Erase leftmost element in the window cnt[num[i - k + 1]]--; if (cnt[num[i - k + 1]] == 0) { les.insert(num[i - k + 1]); }	}	cout << ans << endl;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	// cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} E. 小红的平行四边形 【前置数学知识】 平行四边形由向量 v1=(a,b)v_1=(a,b)v1​=(a,b) 和 v2=(c,d)v_2=(c,d)v2​=(c,d) 构成，那么平行四边形的面积为 A=∣v1×v2∣=∣ad−bc∣A=|v_1\times v_2|=|ad-bc| A=∣v1​×v2​∣=∣ad−bc∣ 首先可以想到一个朴素的 O(n3)O(n^3)O(n3) 算法。先 O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) 枚举两个点，算出一个向量 v1v_1v1​，然后再 O(n)O(n)O(n) 枚举第三个点，判断第四个点是否存在于给定的点里，在的话，就直接用平行四边形面积公式计算。 不过这样会超时。如果一个向量边已知，那么能够组成平行四边形的对边向量也一定是这个。既然一条边是已知的，那么面积就取决于对边之间的距离——也可以说两条直线之间的距离，我们就希望这个距离尽可能远。 那么怎么做呢？既然向量已知，我们可以用一条基准直线，计算其他直线到这条基准直线的有符号距离（+++ 表示在右侧，−-− 表示在左侧，且绝对值越大，离这条直线越远），按有符号距离排序，然后取出开头末尾的两个元素，就是以该向量为一条边的平行四边形中，面积的最大值。 时间复杂度分析：n=1000n=1000n=1000，最多有 O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) 个向量，最坏情况下全部平行，排序需要 O(n2log⁡n2)=O(n2log⁡n)O(n^2\log n^2)= O(n^2\log n)O(n2logn2)=O(n2logn)。因此总的时间复杂度是 O(n2log⁡n)O(n^2\log n)O(n2logn) 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283848586878889909192939495#include <algorithm>#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <map>#include <utility>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	int n;	vector<pll> v;	cin >> n;	map<pair<ll, ll>, vector<pair<int, int>>> mp;	// 方向向量 => vector<点的<下标，下标>>	// first -> second	for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { ll a, b; cin >> a >> b; v.push_back({a, b}); for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) { // from i to j int k = i, kk = j; ll dx = v[i][0] - v[j][0]; ll dy = v[i][1] - v[j][1]; // Force dx to be positive if (dx < 0) { dx = -dx; dy = -dy; swap(k, kk); } else if (dx == 0 && dy < 0) { dy = -dy; swap(k, kk); } // Add to vector mapping mp[{dx, dy}].push_back({k, kk}); }	}	ll ans = -1;	for (auto &[vec, vp] : mp) { // Line equation: ll basex = vp[0].first; ll basey = vp[0].second; ll dx = vec.first; ll dy = vec.second; auto func = [&](int ind) -> ll { return dy * v[ind][0] - dx * v[ind][1]; }; // Sort by signed distance sort(begin(vp), end(vp), [&](pair<int, int> &a, pair<int, int> &b) { return func(a.first) < func(b.first); }); if (vp.size() == 1) continue; auto [b1, e1] = vp[0]; auto [b2, e2] = vp.back(); pll v1 = {v[b2][0] - v[e2][0], v[b2][1] - v[e2][1]}; pll v2 = {v[b2][0] - v[b1][0], v[b2][1] - v[b1][1]}; ans = max(ans, abs(v1[0] * v2[1] - v1[1] * v2[0]));	}	if (ans != -1 && ans != 0) cout << ans << ".0";	else cout << -1;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	// cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} F. 小红小紫画线 容斥原理可解。具体详见 评论区题解 记 𝑆=∑iai𝑆=\sum_ia_iS=∑i​ai​，甲选的两点为 A,BA,BA,B，乙选的两点为 C,DC,DC,D（A、B不分辨，C、D不分辨）。 先考虑两条线段端点不重合的情况： 先不考虑多边形的限制，只需满足 ABABAB 与 CDCDCD 有交叉点，这一选法相当于在多边形上取 444 个点，再将 444 个点按 ACBDACBDACBD 或 CADBCADBCADB 的顺序排列，总方案数为 N1=2×(S4)N_1=2\times\binom{S}{4} N1​=2×(4S​) 从中需要排除掉 ABABAB 或 CDCDCD 其一在同一条边上的情况。这一选法相当于先取一条边 aia_iai​，在 aia_iai​ 上取 333 个点，将 333 个点按 ACBACBACB 或 CADCADCAD 的顺序排列，再在 aia_iai​ 以外的边上取 111 个点，方案数为 N2=2×∑i(S−ai)(ai3)N_2=2\times\sum_i(S-a_i)\binom{a_i}{3} N2​=2×i∑​(S−ai​)(3ai​​) 还需要排除 ABABAB 与 CDCDCD 均在同一条边上的情况。这一选法相当于先取一条边 aia_iai​，在 aia_iai​ 上取 444 个点，再将 444 个点按 ACBDACBDACBD 或 CABDCABDCABD 的顺序排列，方案数为 N3=2×∑i(ai4)N_3=2\times\sum_i\binom{a_i}{4} N3​=2×i∑​(4ai​​) 再考虑两条线段有一个端点重合的情况： 先固定两个重合的端点，考虑另外两个端点，这一选法相当于先取一条边 aia_iai​，在 aia_iai​ 上取 111 个点为 A=CA=CA=C，再在 aia_iai​ 以外的边上取 222 个不同点为 B,DB,DB,D，方案数为 N4=2×∑iai(S−ai2)N_4=2\times\sum_ia_i\binom{S-a_i}{2} N4​=2×i∑​ai​(2S−ai​​) 最终结果即为 N1−N2−N3+N4N_1-N_2-N_3+N_4N1​−N2​−N3​+N4​。 Full Code

title: LGR-174 洛谷二月月赛/FanOI R1
content: LGR-174 洛谷二月月赛题解 2B. 陌路寻诗礼 > 题目链接 我们考虑如何构造。 有 20%20\%20% 的数据是一棵树，我们先考虑如果是一棵树该怎么构造，显然，因为一棵树上 u→vu\to vu→v 的简单路径有且仅有一条，我们让所有边权都是 111 即可。 有 20%20\%20% 的数据是 k=1k=1k=1，此时所有边的边权都只能是 111，那么是否存在合法解，只需要看 u→vu\to vu→v 是不是有两条不同的路径，是的话就无解，否则可以。 至此，我们有了大致构造思路：先全部赋值为 111，然后找是不是有第二条路径，有就修改边权。 那么我们怎么去做这回事呢？我们可以用 BFS 生成树做，从一个点出发，沿着树边的路径就是最短路，包含非树边的路径就不是最短路。 BFS 生成树的性质：对于非树边 e(u,v)e_{(u,v)}e(u,v)​，depv≤depu+1dep_v\le dep_u+1depv​≤depu​+1 我们考虑非树边，当 k>1k>1k>1 时，设非树边 >1>1>1，那么 depv≤depu+1<depu+2dep_v\le dep_u+1\lt dep_u+2depv​≤depu​+1<depu​+2，把边权设置为 222 即可满足条件。 AC Code 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344void solve() { int N, M, K; cin >> N >> M >> K; /* 构建有向图，同时保存边的编号 */ vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> G(N); vector<int> dep(N, -1); vector<bool> vis(M, 0); for (int i = 0, a, b; i < M; i++) { cin >> a >> b; a--, b--; G[a].emplace_back(b, i); } /* 以 1 为根，找一棵BFS树，树边权值为 1，否则为 2 (if K>=2) */ queue<int> q; bool alternative = false; dep[0] = 0; q.push(0); while (!q.empty()) { int u = q.front(); q.pop(); for (const auto &[v, id] : G[u]) { if (dep[v] == -1) { dep[v] = dep[u] + 1; vis[id] = 1; q.push(v); } else { // find a second shortest path if (dep[v] == dep[u] + 1) { alternative = 1; continue; } } } } if (K == 1 && alternative) NO; else { YES; for (int i = 0; i < M; i++) cout << 1 + !vis[i] << " "; cout << ' '; }} 2C/1A. 水影若深蓝 > 题目链接 > 详细思路 怎么想到？主要是给出限制条件 (u,v)(u,v)(u,v) 后，会想到再另外找一个点“夹在当中”。刚好，这另一个点可以用另一个并查集的根节点来替代。 AC Code 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546void solve() { int N, M; cin >> N >> M; /* DSU */ vector<int> fa(N); iota(fa.begin(), fa.end(), 0); auto root = [&](auto self, int x) -> int { return x == fa[x] ? x : fa[x] = self(self, fa[x]); }; auto connect = [&](int x, int y) { x = root(root, x), y = root(root, y); if (x == y) return; fa[x] = y; }; for (int i = 0, a, b; i < M; i++) { cin >> a >> b; a--, b--; connect(a, b); } /* Construct Graph */ vector<vector<int>> G(N); // Find all roots vector<int> rt; for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) if (fa[i] == i) rt.push_back(i); if (rt.size() == 1 && N != 1) return NO, void(); else if (rt.size() == 1 && N == 1) { return cout << "Yes 1 ", void(); } // Connect cout << "Yes "; cout << rt[0] + 1 << " " << rt[1] + 1 << ' '; for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) { if (i == rt[0] || i == rt[1]) continue; if (root(root, i) == rt[0]) cout << i + 1 << " " << 1 + rt[1] << ' '; else cout << i + 1 << " " << rt[0] + 1 << ' '; }} 2D/1B. 半彩三重奏 题解 将树上问题转化成 O(N)O(N)O(N) 枚举树边。 我们先看朴素做法：对于每次询问，拿出树中颜色为 xxx 和颜色为 yyy 的节点，进行连边，将会得到一个森林。设得到了 sss 个连通块，每个连通块的大小为 sizisiz_isizi​ ，则答案为 ∑sizi2\sum siz_i^2∑sizi2​。时间复杂度 O(nq)O(nq)O(nq)。 考虑怎么优化。最慢的地方就在于“拿出树中颜色为 xxx 和颜色为 yyy 的节点，进行连边”了。我们发现，对于树上一条连着两个相同颜色节点的边，它被重复拿出来了好几次。而这个贡献其实是可以预处理的。 题目中的询问，虽然可能有 n2n^2n2 种不同颜色对，但是考虑到在树上链接两个颜色的时候，是通过连接树边的两个端点完成的，所以，我们可以先枚举树边，计算完颜色对的答案，然后 O(1)O(1)O(1) 回答。对于一条树边，只要任何一个端点的颜色不是 a,ba,ba,b，可以直接忽略这条边。 我们可以先预处理同色顶点的树边，然后按颜色对，枚举异色顶点的树边，计算异色对的答案，如果没有树边连接的两点是 a,ba,ba,b 那么即使询问了，答案也只能是各个孤立的连通块的答案和。用更简练的话说，就是有效的颜色对询问是 O(N)O(N)O(N) 的。每算完一个颜色对后，撤销掉操作。 瓶颈是可撤销并查集，不能使用路径压缩，只能用启发式合并或按 rank 合并，时间复杂度 O(nlog⁡n+q)O(n\log n+q)O(nlogn+q) 【错因】赛时想到虚树 + DP，虽然也是颜色对预处理，但是实际上会有重复的询问直接卡掉 AC Code 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <numeric>#include <stack>#include <unordered_map>#include <utility>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;const int INF = numeric_limits<int>::max();using pii = pair<ll, ll>;#define YES cout << "YES "#define NO cout << "NO "#define endl " "struct DSU { vector<ll> fa, siz; stack<pii> op; DSU(int n) : fa(n), siz(n, 1) { iota(fa.begin(), fa.end(), 0); // verdict = false; // 不进行路径压缩 } int root(int x) { if (x == fa[x]) return x; else return root(fa[x]); } bool connect(int x, int y) { x = root(x), y = root(y); if (x == y) return false; // Merge if (siz[x] > siz[y]) swap(x, y); fa[x] = y; siz[y] += siz[x]; // Record (smaller -> larger) op.emplace(x, y); return true; } bool revoke() { if (op.size() == 0) return false; auto [x, y] = op.top(); fa[x] = x; siz[y] -= siz[x]; op.pop(); return true; }};int N, Q;vector<int> a; // 点的颜色vector<ll> ans1; // 某个颜色的答案unordered_map<ll, vector<pii>> tr;unordered_map<ll, ll> ans2;// (颜色对) -> (端点是这两个颜色的所有边)ll hashpair(pii &&x) { return min(x.first, x.second) * 1e6 + max(x.first, x.second); }void solve() { cin >> N >> Q; a.resize(N); ans1.assign(N, 0); // 先处理同色连通块 DSU color(N); for (auto &x : a) cin >> x, x--; for (int i = 1, b; i < N; i++) { cin >> b, b--; if (a[i] == a[b]) { // 颜色相同直接合并 color.connect(i, b); } else { // 否则记录这条边的两端都是什么颜色 tr[hashpair({a[i], a[b]})].push_back({i, b}); } } // 统计某个颜色的所有连通块的内部答案 for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) { if (color.root(i) == i) { ans1[a[i]] += color.siz[i] * color.siz[i]; } } // 统计颜色对的答案 for (auto &[colp, edge] : tr) { for (auto &[u, v] : edge) { int ru = color.root(u), rv = color.root(v); ans2[colp] += 2ll * color.siz[ru] * color.siz[rv]; color.connect(u, v); } for (auto &[u, v] : edge) color.revoke(); } while (Q--) { int a, b; cin >> a >> b, a--, b--; if (a > b) swap(a, b); ll tmp = hashpair(make_pair(a, b)); if (ans2.find(tmp) == ans2.end()) { cout << ans1[a] + ans1[b] << endl; } else { cout << ans1[a] + ans1[b] + ans2[tmp] << endl; } }}int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr); ll t = 1; // cin >> t; while (t--) solve(); return 0;}

title: 2024 CCPC 长春邀请赛暨吉林省赛解题报告
path: /2024/05/19/2024-CCPC-长春邀请赛暨吉林省赛解题报告/
content: 2024 年 CCPC 长春邀请赛暨吉林省赛题解 Gym链接：2024 CCPC 长春邀请赛 题解按难度顺序排列 I. The Easiest Problem 题如其名。没什么好说的。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435#include <array>#include <cctype>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	string a;	getline(cin, a);	int nums = 0;	for (auto ch : a) { if (islower(ch)) nums++;	}	cout << nums;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	// cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} L. Recharge 一道贪心思路结合分类讨论的题。 首先，当充能栏有足够空间时，由于清理大房间等效于清理两次小房间，并且大房间本身有一个额外限制（就是只剩一个充能格的时候，两者等价），所以我们一定是能清理大房间就清理大房间（直到剩下一个充能格，这个时候才清理小房间，否则充能会溢出，产生浪费）。 所以，我们先尽可能清理大房间（搭配一个小房间），直到两者中的一个不够了。 然后再根据小房间讨论，如果小房间还有，就说明大房间不够了，需要用两个小房间等效替换，此时就是直接用充能格计算即可；否则如果小房间没了，只剩大房间，就说明一定有溢出，大房间个数要视 kkk 的奇偶性决定是否 +1+1+1。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	ll k, x, y;	cin >> k >> x >> y;	ll t = k / 2;	ll ans = 0;	if (k == 1) { cout << x + y << endl; return;	}	// 先尽可能用大房间	if (k & 1) { // 是奇数 ans += min(x, y / t); x -= ans; y -= ans * t;	} else { ans += y / t; y -= ans * t;	}	if (x == 0) { // 没有小房间 ans += y / (t + (k & 1));	} else { ans += (y * 2 + x) / k;	}	cout << ans << endl;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	int t = 1;	cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} G. Platform Game 第一下就能想到是一个二分的做法，可惜我还想多了（去想了二分高度） 实际不需要二分高度，每一次机器人移动后，他的高度必定下降，我们可以假定只下降一层（到下一层有甲板的高度），然后在这一个高度上二分横坐标，判断机器人会不会落到某一个甲板上，会的话更新横坐标，否则不管（即机器人继续下落，横坐标相同），直到超过最后一层。 注意特判机器人起始已经超过最底层。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <map>#include <set>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "void solve() {	int n, sx, sy;	cin >> n;	map<ll, set<pll>> plat;	for (int i = 0, a, b, c; i < n; i++) { cin >> a >> b >> c; plat[c].insert({a, b});	}	cin >> sx >> sy;	auto start = plat.upper_bound(sy);	start--;	if (start == plat.end() || start->first > sy) { // S 已经在底层 cout << sx << endl; return;	}	for (;; start--) { // 每次必定往下掉一层 auto ps = start->second; auto nx = ps.upper_bound({sx, 0}); if (nx != ps.begin()) nx--; if (nx != ps.end() && nx->at(0) < sx && nx->at(1) > sx) { sx = nx->at(1); } if (start == plat.begin()) break;	}	cout << sx << endl;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	int t = 1;	cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} E. Connected Components 首先推一下题目的式子，得到 ((ai−i)−(aj−j))×((bi−i)−(bj−j))≤0\Big((a_i-i)-(a_j-j)\Big)\times\Big((b_i-i)-(b_j-j)\Big)\le 0((ai​−i)−(aj​−j))×((bi​−i)−(bj​−j))≤0。于是对于每一个王国，我们直接对 ai,bia_i,b_iai​,bi​ 减去一个下标（令为 ci,dic_i,d_ici​,di​），那么此时 ci,dic_i,d_ici​,di​ 已经 与下标无关，可以排序了。 然后这就是一个偏序问题，我们对 cic_ici​ 从小到大排序。对于第 jjj 个王国，由于 cj≥cic_j\ge c_icj​≥ci​，所以我们只关心 djd_jdj​ 与 did_idi​ 的大小关系（i<ji<ji<j）。连边、询问连通块个数这两个操作可以联想到并查集。没错，我们可以用并查集完成连边操作。 因为一个点加入一个连通块只需要和块内的一个点之间有一条边即可，同理，我们也只需要有一个 di≥djd_i\ge d_jdi​≥dj​ 即可，我们就可以维护一个 dkd_kdk​ 递增的单调队列，新王国加入，就在队列里查找是否可以加入连通块。可以的话，并查集更新，并更新这个连通块内最大的 dkd_kdk​；否则，它自己作为一个新连通块插入单调队列。最后询问并查集中连通块个数。 下面的代码里，第二维排序使用的是倒序。这样的话，当 cic_ici​ 相同，did_idi​ 就是逆序排序的，可以直接在 while 循环里一并使用并查集处理。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374#include <algorithm>#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <numeric>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "vector<int> fa;int root(int x) { return x == fa[x] ? x : fa[x] = root(fa[x]); }void merge(int x, int y) {	x = root(x), y = root(y);	fa[x] = y;}void solve() {	int n;	cin >> n;	fa.resize(n);	iota(begin(fa), end(fa), 0);	vector<pii> v(n);	for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { cin >> v[i][0] >> v[i][1]; v[i][0] -= i; v[i][1] -= i;	}	sort(begin(v), end(v), [&](auto &a, auto &b) { if (a[0] != b[0]) return a[0] < b[0]; else return a[1] > b[1];	});	vector<int> q; // mono-queue	int tmp = 0;	for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (q.size() && v[tmp][1] <= v[i][1]) { tmp = i; } while (!q.empty() && v[q.back()][1] >= v[i][1]) { merge(q.back(), i); q.pop_back(); } q.push_back(tmp);	}	int ans = 0;	for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (root(i) == i) ans++;	}	cout << ans;}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	// cin >> t;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;} D. Parallel Lines 【模型】 当 xxx 需要与之前的所有元素配对，形成一个 group 的时候，只使用一个元素代表这个 group，减少循环次数。 对于一个固定的斜率 KKK，我们考虑如何检查是否合法。我们这里用点+斜率来表示一条直线，那么由于斜率是确定的，一个点就可以表示一条直线。 我们先随便选一个点 bbb，把 bbb 所在直线加入直线集合 SSS，然后依次遍历 SSS 中的所有直线：如果这个点属于 ∃ line∈S\exist\ line\in S∃ line∈S，那么就加入；否则，其作为新的直线加入 SSS。因为题目中给定 ∣S∣≤50|S|\le50∣S∣≤50，所以这一部分的复杂度是 O(n⋅∣S∣)=O(nk)O(n\cdot|S|)=O(nk)O(n⋅∣S∣)=O(nk)。 那么，这个斜率应该如何选取呢？由于每条直线至少有两个点，所以合法的斜率 KKK 一定是某点 iii 与某点 jjj 确定的直线的斜率。可以考虑直接上随机，可以证明随机的 i,ji,ji,j 在同一条直线上的概率（即斜率合法）为 O(1k)O(\frac 1k)O(k1​)，所以可以在 O(k)O(k)O(k) 的时间内找到合法斜率。 因此总的时间复杂度是 O(nk2)O(nk^2)O(nk2). 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283848586#include <array>#include <iostream>#include <limits>#include <random>#include <sstream>#include <vector>using namespace std;using ll = long long;using ld = long double;using vi = vector<int>;using viref = vi &;using pii = array<int, 2>;using pll = array<ll, 2>;const int inf = numeric_limits<int>::max();const ll llinf = numeric_limits<ll>::max();#define yes cout << "YES "#define no cout << "NO "#define endl " "mt19937 rng(time(0));void solve() {	int n, k;	vector<pll> p;	cin >> n >> k;	for (int i = 0, a, b; i < n; i++) { cin >> a >> b, p.push_back({a, b});	}	while (1) { // 随机两个点 // 随机斜率，然后验证 int x = rng() % n, y = rng() % n; if (x == y) continue; pll lean = {p[x][0] - p[y][0], p[x][1] - p[y][1]}; // 斜率 vector<int> st{x}; vector<vi> s(1); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { bool ok = true; for (int j = 0; j < st.size(); j++) { int c = st[j]; pll tmp = {p[i][0] - p[c][0], p[i][1] - p[c][1]}; if (tmp[0] * lean[1] == tmp[1] * lean[0]) { // 检查斜率是否相同，避免 double 丢失精度 s[j].push_back(i); // 是的话，放入同一条直线对应的 vector ok = 0; break; } } if (ok) { // 如果不在已知的直线上，另开一条直线 st.push_back(i); s.push_back({i}); } if (st.size() > k) break; } if (st.size() == k) { stringstream ans; bool ok = 1; for (auto &x : s) { ans << x.size() << " "; if (x.size() < 2) { // 检查答案是否合法 ok = 0; break; } for (auto &i : x) ans << i + 1 << " "; ans << endl; } if (ok) { cout << ans.str(); return; } }	}}int main() {	ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(nullptr), cout.tie(nullptr);	ll t = 1;	while (t--) solve();	return 0;}
